tests.addition_accuracy_bonus: FAIL: Bonus: need >=95% addition accuracy, got 93.74%

source.predict_sum:
def predict_sum(model, img1, img2):
    """Use probability convolution: P(A+B=k) = sum_i P(A=i)*P(B=k-i)."""
    model.eval()
    with torch.no_grad():
        logits1 = model(img1)
        logits2 = model(img2)
        p1 = torch.softmax(logits1, dim=1).cpu()  # (B, 10)
        p2 = torch.softmax(logits2, dim=1).cpu()  # (B, 10)

    B = p1.shape[0]
    # Convolve each pair of distributions
    p_sum = torch.zeros(B, 19)
    for i in range(10):
        for j in range(10):
            p_sum[:, i + j] += p1[:, i] * p2[:, j]

    return p_sum.argmax(dim=1)
